Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part used by org.apache.juneau.http.classic
    Class
    Description
    BasicBooleanPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single boolean value.
    BasicCsvArrayPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a comma-delimited list of string values.
    BasicDatePart
    A NameValuePair that consist of a single HTTP-date.
    BasicIntegerPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single integer value.
    BasicLongPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single long value.
    BasicPart
    Implementation of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries.
    BasicStringPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single string value.
    BasicUriPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single URL value.
    PartList
    An simple list of HTTP parts (form-data, query-parameters, path-parameters).
    SerializedPart
    Subclass of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries using the class.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part used by org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
    Class
    Description
    BasicBooleanPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single boolean value.
    BasicCsvArrayPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a comma-delimited list of string values.
    BasicDatePart
    A NameValuePair that consist of a single HTTP-date.
    BasicIntegerPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single integer value.
    BasicLongPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single long value.
    BasicPart
    Implementation of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries.
    BasicStringPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single string value.
    BasicUriPart
    A NameValuePair that consists of a single URL value.
    PartBeanMeta
    Holds metadata about http part beans (POJOs that get serialized as HTTP parts such as form data or query parameters).
    PartIterator
    A type-safe iterator for NameValuePair objects.
    PartList
    An simple list of HTTP parts (form-data, query-parameters, path-parameters).
    SerializedPart
    Subclass of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries using the class.
